# Akshay Mundra | Python Developer & AI Enthusiast

Akshay Mundra is a Python Developer and AI Enthusiast pursuing a B.Tech in Computer Science at Poornima College of Engineering, Jaipur (2024–2028).

## Technical Toolkit
- **Languages**: Python, Java, C++, SQL, Flutter/Kotlin
- **Frameworks**: React, TypeScript, Pandas & NumPy, Matplotlib, Seaborn
- **Tools**: Git/GitHub, VS Code, Android Studio, MySQL, Vite, Gemini API, Google Maps API

## Professional Experience
- **Python Developer Intern** at Renao Robotics Pvt. Ltd. (Jun 2025)
  - Engineered Python automation scripts.
  - Developed a Pillow-based multiple ID card images generator.

## Key Projects
- **EduBridge** (AI Learning Platform): National Finalist at IIT Bombay Techfest AI Eduthon 2025. Creates customized pathways and quiz cards using Gemini APIs.
- **BlockTrip** (Tourist Safety System): Nominee at Smart India Hackathon 2025. Utilizes location services and offline emergency routing.
- **HomeValuate AI** (House Price Prediction): Machine Learning regression app powered by FastAPI, featuring market analytics, comparison tables, and loan calculators. Live at: https://house-price-prediction-main.vercel.app/
